ContactFlowModuleVersionARN.description: The identifier of the contact flow module version (ARN).
ContactFlowModuleVersionARN.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the contact flow module version (ARN).

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 500  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[-a-z0-9]*:connect:[-a-z0-9]+:[0-9]{12}:instance/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+/flow-module/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+:[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ContactFlowModuleId.description: The identifier of the contact flow module (ARN) this version is tied to.
ContactFlowModuleId.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the contact flow module (ARN) this version is tied to.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 500  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[-a-z0-9]*:connect:[-a-z0-9]+:[0-9]{12}:instance/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+/flow-module/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Version.description: The version number of this revision

The version number of this revision

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the version.

Type: String

FlowModuleContentSha256.description: Indicates the checksum value of the latest published flow module content
FlowModuleContentSha256.markdownDescription:
Indicates the checksum value of the latest published flow module content

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]{64}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
